title: ferray-polynomial: no std::ops trait implementations — must use .add()/.mul() methods
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's polynomial classes support p1 + p2, p1 * p2, p1 ** 3 via Python operator overloading. ferray-polynomial requires explicit method calls: p1.add(&p2)?, p1.mul(&p2)?. Implementing std::ops::Add, Sub, Mul for &Polynomial etc. would make polynomial arithmetic more ergonomic: let p3 = (&p1 + &p2)?;. Since the Poly trait already defines these operations, the impl can delegate directly.
